<<Lithuanian Concert Plan>>
The retired singer will perform 12 traditional Lithuanian songs herself. The total of 18 pieces includes 12 traditional songs and 6 operatic arias, maintaining the twice-as-many ratio. The 3 guest performers add 6 extra pieces, which are separate from the singer's 18. Even if the schedule seems blind to the extra guests, the singer's own set remains fixed at 12 traditional songs.
